analysis: Traffic has collapsed to near-zero. Pricing page went from 0.43/day baseline to 0 visitors in last 6 hours. Overall site traffic is only 5 pageviews in 6 hours. Blog CTA fix from March 21 is not sustaining - need consistent traffic source before optimizing pricing conversion.
